description: Page Views — visualizacoes, top pages, permanencia e bounce rate. Bucket __BUCKET__. Read-only para Viewers.

links.title: Configurações
links.tooltip: Trocar email/senha, publishable key, plano, consumo

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Sessoes unicas (24h)
panels.description: session_id distintos nas ultimas 24h. Proxy de visitas unicas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> keep(columns: ["session_id"])
  |> distinct(column: "session_id")
  |> count()

panels.title: Permanencia media (s, 24h)
panels.description: Media de permanencia_segundos por batch. Cada batch e ~5s, entao valores baixos indicam sessoes curtas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "permanencia_segundos")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> keep(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> distinct(column: "page_type")
  |> count()

panels.title: Visualizacoes timeline por page_type
panels.description: Soma de visualizacoes por page_type em janelas auto-escala.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: Permanencia por pagina (24h)
panels.description: Soma de permanencia_segundos por page_type. Cada batch contribui ~5s, entao este e o tempo ativo agregado de todas as sessoes.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "permanencia_segundos")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: Visitas por device_type (24h)
panels.description: Proporcao de visualizacoes por tipo de dispositivo. Util pra priorizar otimizacoes mobile vs desktop.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["device_type"])
  |> sum()

title: Page Views
